name: How much does AI search optimization cost for a Houston solo practice?

mainEntity.name: How much does AI search optimization cost for a Houston solo practice?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**$500-$5,000 initial setup for solos; $200-1,000/month ongoing.** DIY schema/content is free; agencies charge for audits/monitoring.[2][3]

Value ties to leads: top AI spots convert 3x traditional search.[2] Track ROI via citation frequency.

**Key Factors:**
- Free tools: Schema generators, GSC.[1]
- Pro audits: $1k-3k one-time.[2]
- Content creation: $50-200/page.

**Practical Guidance:** Start free with Lexicon guide, budget $2k for local Houston pages + tracking. Compare pre/post lead volume.

Invest where it scales your cases.
